environment.description: Base32-encoded TOTP secret key used when --secret flag is not provided

post_install_notes: Ensure Ruby 3.0+ is available in your PATH.
For QR code display in the terminal, install the optional rqrcode gem: gem install rqrcode
Store your TOTP secrets securely; consider using a password manager or encrypted environment file.
The TOTP_SECRET environment variable can be set in your shell profile for convenience, but be aware of shell history and process table exposure.
uninstall_notes: Remove the installed binary: sudo rm /usr/local/bin/totp
Remove the man page if installed: sudo rm /usr/local/share/man/man1/totp.1
Optionally uninstall the rqrcode gem: gem uninstall rqrcode
Remove TOTP_SECRET from your shell profile if it was set.
name: totp
author: morgan
